parameters.formDescription:
Techcombank CIBG · Structured Finance

Paste your term sheet below. Processing takes 3–5 minutes. Your memo will appear when complete.

All processing runs locally on your Mac — no data leaves your machine.

values.placeholder: Paste your full term sheet text here...

parameters.jsCode:
const cfg = $('Config').first().json;
const form = $('Deal Input Form').first().json;
const ts = form['Term Sheet'] || Object.values(form)[0] || '';

return [{
  json: {
    term_sheet: ts,
    lm_request: {
      model: cfg.model,
      temperature: 0,
      max_tokens: 4096,
      messages: [
        {
          role: 'system',
          content: 'You are a structured finance document analyst at Techcombank (TCB) in Vietnam.

Extract all key deal parameters into a structured format.

Rules:
1. Extract every commercial term precisely as stated
2. Flag ambiguous or missing items with [MISSING] or [UNCLEAR]
3. Identify governing law and regulatory framework
4. Note whether financials are IFRS or VAS (Vietnamese Accounting Standards)
5. Never invent numbers — use [NOT PROVIDED] if absent

Output: valid JSON only. No explanation, no preamble.'
        },
        {
          role: 'user',
          content: 'Extract all deal terms from this document into a JSON object.

Required keys (use [NOT PROVIDED] if absent):
{
  "borrower": "full legal name",
  "borrower_type": "SOE / Private / FDI / JV / Other",
  "facility_type": "Term Loan / Bond / Revolving Credit / etc.",
  "amount": "numeric amount only",
  "currency": "VND / USD / EUR",
  "tenor": "e.g. 5 years",
  "pricing": "interest rate or spread",
  "pricing_basis": "fixed / floating / SOFR / VND base rate",
  "security": "collateral description",
  "security_value": "collateral value if stated",
  "purpose": "use of proceeds",
  "repayment_schedule": "semi-annual / bullet / amortising",
  "covenants": ["list"],
  "conditions_precedent": ["list"],
  "governing_law": "Vietnamese law / other",
  "accounting_standard": "IFRS / VAS / Unknown",
  "ebitda_annual": null,
  "total_debt": null,
  "interest_rate_pct": null,
  "tenor_years": null,
  "collateral_value_number": null,
  "missing_or_unclear": ["list"]
}

Numeric fields: number only (USD 25M = 25000000, 3.5% = 3.5). Use null if not stated.

DOCUMENT:
' + ts + '

JSON only. No other text.'
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}];

nodes.name: Parse Market Intel + Build Fin Params

main.node: Parse Market Intel + Build Fin Params
